text: I am ra we paused to scan this instrument's consciousness for permission to use its experiential catalyst as example we may proceed. This is one instance, and extrapolation may be made to other entities which are aware of the process of evolution. This entity chose a before incarnation the means whereby catalyst had great probability of a being obtained. This entity desired the process of expressing love and light without expecting any return this instrument programmed also to endeavor to accomplish a spiritual work and to a comfort itself with companionship in the doing of this work. Agreements were made prior to incarnation, the first with the so-called parents and siblings of this entity. This provided the experiential catalyst for the situation of offering radiance of a being without expectation of return. These agreements provided and will approved in your time, a space, and space, time, continuum opportunities for the experiential catalyst of work and calm red ship. In that they were a possibility probability vortices having to do with your societal culture. Those aware of evolution and desirous in the very extreme of attaining the heart of love and the radiance which gives understanding no matter what the lessons programmed, they have to do with other selves, not with events. They have to do with giving, not receiving. For the lessons of love are of this nature, both for positive and negative. Those negatively harvestable will be found at this time, endeavoring to share their love of self. Of these, we may say that the process is guarded by those who never cease their watchful expectation of being of service. There is no entity without help, either through self awareness of the unity of creation or true guardians of the self which protect the less sophisticated mind, body, spirit from any permanent separation from unity, while the lessons of your density continue.
